problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
